message:
deps: bump ftui-* family 0.2.1 -> 0.3.1

Sibling FrankenTUI packages published 2026-04-12 at 0.3.0 and
2026-04-12 at 0.3.1. This is a 0.x minor-major bump that we
validated against all 52 call sites across 6 files:
- crates/frankenlibc_conformance/src/lib.rs
- crates/frankenlibc-membrane/examples/killer_demo.rs
- crates/frankenlibc-harness/src/evidence_decode_render.rs
- crates/frankenlibc-harness/src/snapshot_diff.rs
- crates/frankenlibc-harness/src/diff.rs
- crates/frankenlibc-harness/src/explainability_workbench.rs

Files changed (manifest only):
- Cargo.toml (workspace root: ftui-harness)
- crates/frankenlibc-harness/Cargo.toml (ftui-core/layout/render/style/widgets)
- crates/frankenlibc-membrane/Cargo.toml (ftui-core/layout/render/style/widgets dev-deps)
- crates/frankenlibc_conformance/Cargo.toml (ftui_harness renamed dep)

Verified:
- rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets (clean, all
  ftui-* 0.3.1 transitive deps resolved)
- rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-membrane --lib
  1339/1340 pass; 1 pre-existing flake
  (runtime_math::localization_chooser::tests::observe_throughput_below_strict_budget)
  passes in isolation. Same flake noted by the prior asupersync
  session. Unrelated to ftui.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -42,4 +42,4 @@ frankenlibc-fixture-exec = { path = "crates/frankenlibc-fixture-exec" }
 
 # Companion crates (build tooling only)
 asupersync-conformance = "0.3.1"
-ftui-harness = "0.2.1"
+ftui-harness = "0.3.1"

@@ -55,6 +55,12 @@
 - **Breaking:** None (still 4.x, patch).
 - **Build:** `rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets` -> clean.
 
+#### ftui-* (core/layout/render/style/widgets/harness): 0.2.1 -> 0.3.1
+- **Scope:** workspace root Cargo.toml + crates/frankenlibc-harness/Cargo.toml + crates/frankenlibc-membrane/Cargo.toml + crates/frankenlibc_conformance/Cargo.toml
+- **Breaking:** 0.x minor-major (0.2.1 -> 0.3.1). Tested against our 52 call sites in 6 files; all compile cleanly with no API change needed.
+- **Build:** `rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets` -> clean.
+- **Tests:** `rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-membrane --lib` -> 1339/1340 pass; 1 pre-existing flake (`runtime_math::localization_chooser::tests::observe_throughput_below_strict_budget`, passes in isolation) identical to the one noted in the previous asupersync bump session. Unrelated to ftui.
+
 #### proptest: 1.6 -> 1.11 (dev-dep)
 - **Scope:** crates/frankenlibc-core/Cargo.toml, crates/frankenlibc-membrane/Cargo.toml
 - **Breaking:** None published between 1.6 and 1.11 that affect our call sites (no strategy/config API changes).

@@ -23,11 +23,11 @@ proptest = "1.11"
 libc = { workspace = true }
 asupersync-conformance = { workspace = true }
 ftui-harness = { workspace = true }
-ftui-core = "0.2.1"
-ftui-layout = "0.2.1"
-ftui-render = "0.2.1"
-ftui-style = "0.2.1"
-ftui-widgets = "0.2.1"
+ftui-core = "0.3.1"
+ftui-layout = "0.3.1"
+ftui-render = "0.3.1"
+ftui-style = "0.3.1"
+ftui-widgets = "0.3.1"
 
 [build-dependencies]
 sha2 = { workspace = true }
